title: Talvo Talent Query API (Sub0 + Gemini)
description: Natural-language talent intelligence — the hackathon 'Zero to Query' feature. Sub0 stores structured applicant data; Gemini answers recruiter questions with context.

endpoints.summary: Ask a natural-language question over job/applicant data
exampleQuestions: Show backend candidates with PostgreSQL and 3+ years.
Which candidates have the strongest React experience?
Find shortlisted candidates with weak education match.
flow: 2. Sub0 loads structured applicants + job criteria
3. Express Gemini worker generates answer with citations
